Off Calendar Jun-29-2022 Continued To Jul-13-22 At 09:00 A.M. In Dept 204

PETITION FOR PROBATE OF WILL AND FOR LETTERS TESTAMENTARY
Off Calendar Jun-29-2021 Granted Per Written Order
MINI MINUTES:

No appearance was made by any Party, Counsel or Interested Person.

This matter was put on for hearing with no appearance required for the purpose of admitting the will. The matter being duly noticed and there being no objections, the Court granted the Petition for Probate of Will and for Letters Testamentary. The will dated June 9, 2019 is admitted to probate. Scot Hammond is appointed as the Executor of the estate with full authority. Bond is not required. Order for the same signed in open Court. Status on close of estate is set for June 29, 2022 at 9:00 a.m., in Dept. 204. If a petition for final distribution or a petition for approval of report on status of administration is filed two weeks prion, the status hearing will be taken off calendar.

Judge Joseph M. Quinn. Clerk: Rosie Noguera. Deputy. D. Johnson. Not reported.
